summary: SINGLE_FOCUS Bitcoin mining simulation. Top: header Tex and target prefix '000'. Center live display of Integer nonce + current SHA-256 hash + prefix-comparison status. Iterates up to 120 nonces starting from a random seed, showing 12 RED failed attempts (prefix mismatch), then Transforms to the winning nonce — hash, status, and GREEN SurroundingRectangle highlight. Bottom-right RED Integer failed_count ticks up. Summary: expected tries ≈ 16^k for k leading zeros. Uses actual hashlib.sha256 computation.
